# Version 3.116.1
> **NuGet packaging patch** · Released December 5, 2024 · [NuGet](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/3.116.1) · [GitHub Release](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/releases/tag/v3.116.1)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](3.116.1/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/8.3.0.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 3.116.1 fixes a NuGet packaging issue and updates the Android NDK to r27c.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this release.*

## Bug Fixes

- **PackagePath attribute corrected** — An incorrect PackagePath attribute was causing issues with NuGet package layout; this is now fixed. ([#3102](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3102))
- **Android NDK updated to r27c with 16 KB alignment** — The Android NDK is updated to r27c, adding support for the 16 KB memory page alignment required by newer Android devices. ([#3098](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3098))

## HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1

Packages the HarfBuzzSharp 8.3.0.1 binding with the packaging and NDK fixes from this release.
